---
title: "pathRegistry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.ts"
loc: 56
complexity: 8
logic_score: 5.40
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 7.00
overall_score: 4.22
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://path)
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `currentDir`
- `PathRegistry`
- `currentDir`
- `previousDir`
- `packageJsonPath`
- `agentConfigPath`
- `normalized`
- `dir`
- `abs`
- `registry`
- `registry`
